zh.lifeSummary: 當John Moulton於1415年出生在英國諾福爾可莫爾頓 聖 瑪麗時，他的父親John Moulton30歲，母親Margaret26歲。他和Agnes Elizabeth Swayvesland至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1494年在英國諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 邁克爾享年79歲。

nameMeanings.name: Moulton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Cheshire and Lancashire): habitational name from one or more of the places called Moulton (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire, Suffolk, North Yorkshire), most of which are named with the Old English personal name Mūl(a), the Old Norse personal name Múli, or Old English mūl ‘mule’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Molden
meanings: metronymic from the Middle English female personal name Mold, a form of Maud, with the characteristically West Midland genitival suffix -en.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Moulton was born in 1415, in Moulton St Mary, Norfolk, England, his father, John Moulton, was 30 and his mother, Margaret, was 26. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Agnes Elizabeth Swayvesland. He died in 1494, in Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, England, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Moulton est né en 1415, à Moulton St Mary, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, John Moulton, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Agnes Elizabeth Swayvesland. Il est décédé en 1494, à Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans.

ko.Ormesby Saint Margaret, Great Yarmouth,: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 세인트 마거릿
ko.lifeSummary: John Moulton(이)가 1415년 영국 노르폴크 모우턴 스트 메리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Moulton(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Agnes Elizabeth Swayvesland(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1494년 영국 노르폴크 오메스비 스트 믹하얼에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Ormesby Saint Margaret, Great Yarmouth,: ормесби сеинт маргарет, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Moulton родился в 1415 г. в местности моултон ст мэри, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Moulton было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret, 26. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Agnes Elizabeth Swayvesland. Он умер в 1494 г. в местности ормесби ст мачаел, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 79 лет.
